App

Midday Journey

Midday Journey will be dedicated to cross chain swap functionality of RetroBridge. As a reward for users commitment to Midday Journey they will receive Soulbound NFT, which is impossible to transfer or sell.

and obtain second of four RetroBridge Phases NFTs
